headline: The Inner Circle acknowledges, LaToya C. James, VP as an Inner Circle Lifetime Member
summary: Prominently featured in The Inner Circle, LaToya C. James, VP is recognized as an Inner Circle Lifetime Member for her contributions to Driving Transformation and Strategic Growth in Global IT.

headline: Cognizant to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: CTSH's Q1 performance is likely to have benefited from steady growth forecasts, strong bookings, and GenAI momentum amid macro pressures.

headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Launches AI-Powered Agentic Retail CX in Collaboration With Google Cloud
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks with the highest upside potential. On April 22, Cognizant launched Agentic Retail CX, a specialized AI-powered contact center solution developed in collaboration with Google Cloud and built on the Gemini Enterprise platform. The offering is designed to help retailers transition from experimental AI […]
